buffer.name: Breakthrough

buffer.desc: · When there are 1/2 Agents with Attack specialty in the squad, the whole squad's CRIT DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 20%/60%</color>.\n· After an EX Special Attack or Ultimate, the Agent's <color=#2EB6FF>Electric DMG</color> <color=#2BAD00>increases</color> by 20%. For Agents with Attack specialty, their DMG <color=#2BAD00>further increases by 30%</color> for 20s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
buffer.name: Combined Attack

buffer.desc: · Agent Anomaly Proficiency <color=#2BAD00>increases by 20</color>, and Attribute Anomaly DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 10%</color>.\n· When inflicting an Attribute Anomaly on an enemy, the whole squad's CRIT DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 60%</color>, and the enemy's DEF <color=#2BAD00>decreases by 10%</color> for 15s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
buffer.name: Singular Blade

buffer.desc: · Agent Sheer DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 20%</color>.\n· After launching EX Special Attack, Agents with Rupture specialty deal <color=#2BAD00>50% bonus</color> CRIT DMG, and their <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> as well as <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> ignore <color=#2BAD00>30%</color> of enemy <color=#F0D12B>Physical RES</color> on hit for 15s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
buffer.name: Decree

buffer.desc: · Agent Anomaly Proficiency <color=#2BAD00>increases by 20</color>, and Attribute Anomaly DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 10%</color>.\n· When inflicting an Attribute Anomaly on an enemy, the whole squad's CRIT DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 60%</color>, and the enemy's DEF <color=#2BAD00>decreases by 10%</color> for 15s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
buffer.name: Singular Blade

buffer.desc: · Agent <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color> and <color=#F0D12B>Physical DMG</color> <color=#2BAD00>increase by 40%</color>, and <color=#FFFFFF>Abloom</color> DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 20%</color>.\n· After an Agent inflicts an <color=#FFFFFF>Attribute Anomaly</color> on an enemy, their DEF <color=#2BAD00>is reduced by 15%</color>, and their <color=#98EFF0>Ice RES</color> <color=#2BAD00>is reduced by 30%</color> for 10s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
buffer.name: Chilling Edge

buffer.desc: · Agent Sheer DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 20%</color>.\n· After launching EX Special Attack, Agents with Rupture specialty deal <color=#2BAD00>50% bonus</color> CRIT DMG, and their <color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color> as well as <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> ignore <color=#2BAD00>30%</color> of enemy <color=#F0D12B>Physical RES</color> on hit for 15s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
buffer.name: Decree

buffer.desc: · Agent CRIT DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 30%</color>.\n· ATK of Agents with Attack specialty <color=#2BAD00>increases by 10%</color>. Their Basic Attack DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 30%</color> and ignore <color=#2BAD00>15%</color> of enemy DEF.
buffer.name: Heartcrusher

buffer.desc: · Agent ATK <color=#2BAD00>increases by 10%</color>. After inflicting <color=#FFFFFF>Vortex</color> on an enemy, the whole squad's ATK <color=#2BAD00>increases by 5%</color>, and Anomaly Proficiency <color=#2BAD00>increases by 10</color>, lasting for 15s, stacking up to 3 times. Repeated triggers reset the duration.\n· After inflicting a <color=#A6C5FD>Wind</color> or <color=#98EFF0>Ice</color> Attribute Anomaly on an enemy, the enemy's DEF <color=#2BAD00> decreases by 10%</color> for 20s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
buffer.name: Northern Wind

buffer.desc: · <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> specialty Agents' <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color> and <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color> <color=#2BAD00>increases by 35%</color>.\n· <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color> and <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> <color=#2BAD00>deal 20%</color> more DMG, ignoring <color=#2BAD00>10%</color> of the enemy's <color=#2BAD00>DEF</color>. After launching a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color>/<color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, the Agent's CRIT DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 45%</color> for 20s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
buffer.name: Onslaught

buffer.desc: · <color=#FFFFFF>Attack</color> specialty Agents' <color=#FE437E>Ether DMG</color> and <color=#98EFF0>Ice DMG</color> <color=#2BAD00>increases by 35%</color>.\n· <color=#FFFFFF>Basic Attack</color> and <color=#FFFFFF>Ultimate</color> <color=#2BAD00>deal 20%</color> more DMG, ignoring <color=#2BAD00>10%</color> of the enemy's <color=#2BAD00>DEF</color>. After launching a <color=#FFFFFF>Chain Attack</color>/<color=#FFFFFF>EX Special Attack</color>, the Agent's CRIT DMG <color=#2BAD00>increases by 45%</color> for 20s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
buffer.name: Onslaught
